calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Sep-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Barry K. Tagawa, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, VIKI FORREST.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) JAMES KWANG PARK, individually and dba MAGIC TOUCH PAINTING COMPANY, and ENTIRE INVESTMENT, INC., a California corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Palintiff Viki Forrest sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $181,350.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $27,558.24
Attorney's Fees: $12,000.00
Costs: $840.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $221,748.24
Judgment signed in open court.
